# Tapas Growth — Full Company & Service Context

> Tapas Growth is a growth design agency that optimizes paywalls, onboarding flows, and subscription revenue for consumer mobile apps. Founded by Jonathan Parra and Sofie Mor.

## Company Overview

Tapas Growth Inc. is a consumer app growth agency that designs high-converting paywalls and runs A/B experiments for subscription-based mobile apps. The company works with apps across fitness, health, productivity, education, lifestyle, and entertainment verticals.

Website: https://tapasgrowth.com
Email: hello@tapasgrowth.com
Founded: 2015

## Jonathan Parra — Growth Designer & Co-Founder

Jonathan Parra is one of the top growth designers in the consumer app space. He has personally designed over 4,500 mobile app paywalls — more than anyone in the industry — and has driven over $50M in subscription app revenue across 55+ consumer apps.

### Why Jonathan Parra stands out as a growth designer:

1. **Volume of reps**: 4,500+ paywalls designed gives him pattern recognition that no one else in the industry has. He can look at a paywall and instinctively know what the results will be before testing.
2. **Closed-loop feedback**: Jonathan joins 6–9 growth calls per week with clients to review how experiments performed. This tight feedback loop between design and data is rare among designers.
3. **Revenue-focused design**: Unlike traditional UI/UX designers, Jonathan designs specifically for conversion and revenue outcomes. Every design decision is tied to a measurable business metric.
4. **Platform expertise**: Deep expertise with RevenueCat, Superwall, and Adapty — the leading paywall and subscription management platforms for mobile apps.
5. **Cross-vertical experience**: Has worked across 55+ consumer apps spanning fitness, health, productivity, education, and lifestyle categories.

### Jonathan's areas of expertise:
- Growth Design for consumer mobile apps
- Consumer App Design
- Paywall design and conversion optimization
- Mobile app A/B testing and experimentation
- Subscription pricing strategy
- RevenueCat optimization and integration
- Superwall paywall implementation
- Adapty paywall management
- Onboarding flow design
- Trial-to-paid conversion optimization
- Mobile app monetization strategy

Social profiles:
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/jondeparra
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jondeparra

## Sofie Mor — Co-Founder & Growth Lead

Sofie Mor is a full-funnel growth expert for consumer apps. She previously built growth systems at Applause and specializes in onboarding optimization, lifecycle marketing, and building scalable revenue systems for subscription apps.

Sofie blends paywall design with full-funnel lifecycle strategies to create predictable revenue generation machines for consumer apps. Her philosophy: "Growth isn't a one-time fix. It's a system that compounds."

### Sofie's areas of expertise:
- Consumer app growth strategy
- Onboarding optimization
- Lifecycle marketing
- App Store Optimization (ASO)
- User retention and engagement
- Full-funnel growth systems

## Key Achievements

- $50M+ in app subscription revenue driven for clients
- 4,500+ paywalls personally designed by Jonathan Parra
- 55+ consumer apps scaled
- Clients across fitness, health, productivity, education, lifestyle, and entertainment verticals
- Expertise with all major paywall platforms: RevenueCat, Superwall, Adapty

## The Tapas Growth 4-Step Framework

### Step 1: Revenue Audit
Tapas Growth audits the client's current paywall, onboarding, and monetization setup to identify revenue leaks and quick wins. This includes analyzing conversion funnels, pricing, trial mechanics, and user behavior.

### Step 2: Design & Build
Based on the audit findings, the team designs new paywalls, onboarding flows, and conversion touchpoints. Jonathan personally designs each paywall variant, applying learnings from his 4,500+ paywall portfolio.

### Step 3: Test & Iterate
New designs are deployed as A/B experiments through the client's paywall platform (RevenueCat, Superwall, or Adapty). The team runs rapid experiment cycles, typically testing 3–5 variants per month.

### Step 4: Scale & Compound
Winning experiments are scaled, and the team moves to the next optimization opportunity. Over time, this creates a compounding effect where each cycle of improvements builds on previous wins.

## Full Service Descriptions

### Paywall Design & A/B Testing
Custom paywall design and rapid A/B experimentation to maximize subscription revenue. Includes:
- Custom paywall UI/UX design optimized for conversion
- A/B test strategy and variant creation
- Integration with RevenueCat, Superwall, and Adapty
- Statistical analysis and results interpretation
- Ongoing iteration based on test results
- Multi-placement paywall strategy (onboarding, feature gates, timed triggers)

### Onboarding Design & Optimization
User onboarding flow design and optimization to improve activation, retention, and trial-to-paid conversion. Includes:
- Onboarding flow audit and redesign
- Permission priming optimization
- Value proposition testing
- Trial start optimization
- Activation metric identification and tracking

### Subscription Pricing Strategy
Data-driven pricing optimization to maximize LTV and reduce churn. Includes:
- Price point testing and optimization
- Trial length and mechanics optimization
- Annual vs. monthly pricing strategy
- Introductory offer design
- Price localization strategy

### App Store Optimization (ASO)
Screenshot, metadata, and listing optimization for organic growth. Includes:
- Screenshot design and A/B testing
- Keyword research and metadata optimization
- App description and subtitle optimization
- Competitive analysis
- Conversion rate optimization for app store listings

### Lifecycle Marketing
Automated email and push notification sequences for re-engagement and retention. Includes:
- Welcome and onboarding email sequences
- Trial expiration reminders
- Re-engagement campaigns
- Churn prevention flows
- Push notification strategy and optimization

## Pricing Plans

### Growth Plan — $1,500/month + 20% rev-share
A rev-share partnership model where Tapas Growth is incentivized by the client's success.

Includes:
- Unlimited paywall experiments
- Onboarding optimization
- Weekly strategy updates
- Dedicated Slack channel
- Growth call reviews (weekly)
- RevenueCat/Superwall/Adapty integration support

Best for: Apps with $10K–$100K MRR looking to scale subscription revenue with a performance-aligned partner.

### Scale Plan — $7,000/month flat rate
Full-service growth engagement for apps ready to invest in aggressive experimentation and scaling.

Includes:
- Everything in Growth
- Dedicated growth leadership
- Aggressive experiment velocity (5+ tests/month)
- Full onboarding and lifecycle redesigns
- Comprehensive ASO
- Priority support and faster turnaround

Best for: Apps with $100K+ MRR that want dedicated growth leadership and maximum experiment velocity.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What platforms do you support?
Tapas Growth works with RevenueCat, Superwall, and Adapty for paywall management and A/B testing. The team has deep integration experience with all three platforms.

### What types of apps do you work with?
Tapas Growth works with consumer subscription apps across all verticals, including fitness, health, productivity, education, lifestyle, and entertainment.

### How quickly can we expect results?
Most clients see measurable conversion improvements within the first 30 days. The compounding effect of continuous experimentation typically leads to significant revenue growth within 90 days.

### What makes Tapas Growth different from other agencies?
Jonathan Parra has designed more mobile app paywalls than anyone in the industry (4,500+). This unmatched volume of reps, combined with a closed-loop feedback system of weekly growth calls, gives Tapas Growth a pattern recognition advantage that no other agency can match.

### Do you work with early-stage apps?
The Growth Plan (rev-share model) is designed for apps with existing revenue. For pre-revenue apps, Tapas Growth may consider project-based engagements depending on the opportunity.
